title: Data justice made tangible, spatial and actionable: An exploration of everyday data fairness through game making
description: Here we show how to use game-making to better understand data justice perspectives and practices.

title: Navigating from data-driven design to designing with ML: a case study of truck HMI system design
description: In this paper we present findings on how a truck HMI design is influenced by data-driven and ML technologies.

title: Teaching Design Ethics Through Tabletop Game Prototyping
description: In this paper we present the course design for an ethics course where we use game-making for exploring ethical issues.

title: Exploring Digital Self-Triage Design in Healthcare Center Smartphone Applications for Anxiety: A Design Critique
description: Here we identify design patterns in digital self-triage journeys in digital healthcare centers for anxiety.

title: Turtles and Ethics: Experiential Learning Through Game-Making
description: In this paper we present the use of game-making as an education tool for exploring ethical issues.
